name: LED Outdoor Emergency Light With Adjustable Duel Heads And Battery Backup
description: Stay safe during power outages with the ZION LED USA Waterproof Emergency Light. Designed for both wall and ceiling mounting, this light is perfect for outdoor wet locations. It’s energy-efficient, durable, and built to last—making it a smart choice for homes, businesses, and industrial spaces.
short_desc: Key Features: Wall or Ceiling Mount: Easy to install in multiple locations Low Power, High Reliability: Uses just 5W of power, with 2W emergency output Built-in Backup Battery: 3.6V Nickel Cadmium battery provides 90+ minutes of emergency lighting Easy to Monitor: Includes test switch and charge indicator Waterproof Design: Built to withstand rain and moisture Wide Voltage Range: Works with 100-277V AC systems Specifications: Input Power: 5W Output Power: 2W Battery: 3.6V 600mAh Ni-Cd Backup Time: ≥ 90 minutes Mounting: Wall or ceiling Use: Indoor and outdoor (wet rated) Great For: Commercial Spaces: Offices, stores, warehouses Industrial Areas: Factories, utility rooms Outdoor Use: Parking garages, walkways Residential Buildings: Homes and apartments
